rules.name: Purpose Gate
rules.requirement: Page must explain why it exists inside Hoax.ai category system

rules.name: Definition Gate
rules.requirement: Page must define governed concept, term, state, dimension, boundary, or framework

rules.name: Scope Gate
rules.requirement: Page must state what it covers and does not cover

rules.name: Governance Boundary Gate
rules.requirement: Page must state what it must not be read to claim

rules.name: System Relationship Gate
rules.requirement: Page must connect to at least one governed layer
rules.notes: Taxonomy, standard, protocol, governance, or traceability layer.

rules.name: Claim Traceability Gate
rules.requirement: Major claim-bearing statements must map to evidence ledger and claim-source map

rules.name: Source Scope Gate
rules.requirement: External factual claims require registered external source support
rules.notes: Internal governance claims use repository support within scope.

rules.name: Semantic SEO Discipline Gate
rules.requirement: SEO metadata clarifies governed concept without unsupported claims or tool implications
rules.notes: SEO after thesis, claim scope, source scope defined.

rules.name: Prohibited Misreading Gate
rules.requirement: Page must prevent truth-machine, detector, upload, scoring, accusation misreadings

rules.name: Internal Link Gate
rules.requirement: Internal links only to registered existing eligible routes

rules.name: Technical Quality Gate
rules.requirement: Page must pass technical quality gate before release

rules.name: Interface Boundary Gate
rules.requirement: No scanner, detector, fake/real, scoring, surveillance, threat-dashboard visual logic

rules.name: Review Status Gate
rules.requirement: Page must include last reviewed or review status metadata

rules.name: No Thin SEO Gate
rules.requirement: Page must not be keyword-only, search-volume-first, or SEO route filler
rules.notes: SEO clarifies substance; does not replace it.

rules.name: No Tool-Implying Content Gate
rules.requirement: Page must not imply active classifier, upload, scoring, or detector capability

rules.name: Publisher Boundary Gate
rules.requirement: Page must not be publisher-generated without approved candidate state and dry-run harness
rules.notes: Publisher remains blocked until dry-run harness.
